subject: An anime figure with short hair in a bright green and yellow costume with headphones visible around the neck, expressive anime face, cheerful pose
description: A close-up portrait of an anime character with a short haircut, rendered in a bright, clean anime style. The figure wears a vivid green outfit with yellow accents and has a pair of headphones resting at their collar. Their expression is lively and expressive with large anime eyes. The card title and set context (Hatsune Miku -Project DIVA- f) place this figure in the Vocaloid performance universe. The palette is saturated greens and yellows against a lighter background.
